. “Come by The Penthouse soon, ‘kay?” After telling her you will, she releases you, hopping back a step and clapping her hands gently together. You.” She smiles, slightly chewing the corner of her lip.
Have Some Fun

As you enter the Penthouse, you find that the lights are dimmed. Somewhere in the room a song is playing faintly, but far too quiet to make out. Looking around, you spot Pink on the other side of the room seated on the couch, watching a small section of the monitor wall that also seems to be the source of the music. As you move towards her, you can tell she hasn’t noticed that you’re there, the terran woman completely enthralled by whatever she’s watching. You spot a glass of wine in her hand as you get close, with a large empty bottle on the table in front of her. It isn’t until you’re within a few feet that she hears you, snapping to attention and letting out a sudden gasp of surprise. “[pc.name]!” she jumps, the wine in her glass nearly sloshing out as she taps a codex next to her, the music muting. “Wh- I wasn’t expecting company tonight.” Pink’s cheeks are noticeably rosy. You can smell the wine on her breath as well, but even so you get the impression she’s not THAT drunk. Turning to the muted screen you ask the tipsy woman what she was watching. “What I was...” Pink turns to the screen, her finger grazing over the codex. “Ahh, uh, I was just reminiscing.” “Reminiscing?” You ask, turning to take a real look at what’s on the screen. At first glance it looks like a music video, but after watching it play for a few seconds you note it to be live concert footage. You don’t know the band playing, but one member you surprisingly recognize. Playing the bass, and having the brightest blonde hair you’ve ever seen, is Pink, bobbing to the beat of the muted song. “Yeah...” Pink sighs, takes a sip from her wine, then unmutes the music. The volume is low, but being so close now to its source you can clearly make it out. It’s a poppy song, quite catchy in fact, and one you’re almost certain you’ve heard before. [pc.isTaur|Squatting down next to Pink|Taking a seat next to Pink], you listen closely, trying to remember where you’ve heard it. “What is this?” you ask, with the name of the tune on the tip of your tongue. Pink chuckles, the color in her cheeks turning a bit darker. “It’s ‘Party Time’ by Blow,” she sips her wine again. “It was a pretty big hit, ahhh, around fifty years ago or so. Gets a good deal of playtime still.” “Fifty years ago?” you glance over at the screen, giving the younger Pink in the video a once over. You tell Pink that aside from the hair she looks exactly the same. Pink snorts then lets out an awkward laugh. “Yeah, I always made for a great blonde.” Downing her drink, she smacks her lips and sets the glass aside. “So, are you just checking in on me or what?”

Smiling, Scully pulls off his heavy jacket, then turns and hands it to his younger daughter. “Put this away for daddy, please. Then wash up for dinner.” With a nod, Sata takes the jacket and hurries off, disappearing into a side hall. Returning his attention to you, the older Huskar sniffs the air. “I assume you’re staying for supper, yes? Oh, you’re in for a treat! Come, come. I can smell it’s almost done, and my wife is one hell of a cook!” Shepherding you through the doorway his wife exited before, you find yourself in a room just as big as the living room that serves as both a kitchen and eating area. Most of the room is dominated by a massive table, with what you quickly count as twenty seats positioned around it, although you note only seven settings are laid out. The far wall of the room looks dedicated to cooking, with a massive oven fired up and the most delicious smell wafting through the air. You also can’t miss the towering figure of Ori, who turns as the three of you enter. “Darling!” She prances over, her heavy chest bouncing. Coming up to her husband, she bends at the waist, nearly folding herself in half to give her comically shorter husband a kiss on the cheek. “I see you’ve met our dinner guest. Come, sit all of you! Dinner is just about ready.” Moving to the table, you find a place at one of the settings, [var0] parking herself on your right. Scully sits at the head of the table, towards your left, leaving one vacant seat beside you and three across. You notice one of the chairs, on Scully’s direct left, looks much larger and sits far lower than all the other chairs. “Shall I call the pups, dear?” Ori chimes, leaning down low to pull something from the oven. Swallowing hard, you find yourself staring at her huge rump. “I got it, love.” Scully puts a finger and thumb in his mouth, letting out a sharp whistle. Immediately you hear the sounds of footsteps up above, at least two sets if your hearing is correct. On your left, a scraping against the floor causes you to jump for the second time today. You find yourself in a mini staring contest with the young pup, as the footsteps draw closer. “Oh man, I’m stavi- Uh, who’s this?” You turn to find a slightly new face. You can quickly tell this is [var0]’s other sister. Taller than most of her family, except her mother of course, you’re fairly sure she’s also younger than [var0], the way she’s dressed screams teenaged girl. While not as big as her father, she’s slightly on the plump side, although her extra height allows her to carry the weight a bit better. One thing about her that really strikes you is her very prominent resting bitch face. Scully smiles, addressing this third daughter. “This is Ari’s boss, [pc.name]. They’ll be joining us for dinner this evening.” Turning to you, he gestures to the new arrival. “This lovely young woman is Inna, my second youngest... And that handsome young man sulking about is my son Gol.” Looking back, you note another family member entered the room, waddling more than walking. Around the same height as Inna but significantly fatter, Gol strikes you as something of an odd specimen. A thick mop of black hair covers most of his face, his clothes wrinkled and stained, with something about him telling you he just rolled out of bed. He must be the younger brother [var0] mentioned before, the one she only spoke of briefly and not favorably. “Can I eat in my room...” he murmurs, his voice sullen. “Gol, we’ve talked about this.” Ori chimes, not even looking over her shoulder at her son. “We eat together in this household.” “Uhhh,” the chunky half-breed sits down across from [var0], the chair creaking under his weight. Inna snorts, then takes a seat next to her brother, immediately pulling out a small codex, thumbs flying. “Not at the table, Inna.” Scully chides, smiling when his daughter huffs and stuffs it away. Ori sweeps in a moment later, laying down an absolutely massive platter of meat and steamed veggies on the table. Taking a seat herself, her chest half on the table, she clears her throat and smiles. “Dinner is served. Dig in!”
